title: Add pagination to GET /tasks
description: The GET /api/tasks endpoint currently returns all tasks in one response. As the dataset grows this will cause performance issues. We need to add pagination support.
acceptance_criteria: GET /api/tasks accepts optional query params: page (default 0) and size (default 10)
Response should be wrapped in a Page object containing: content (list of tasks), totalElements, totalPages, currentPage
Existing behaviour without params should still work (defaults apply)
A new unit test must cover the paginated response
technical_notes: Use Spring Data's Pageable and Page<T>. The repository already extends JpaRepository which supports findAll(Pageable). Update TaskController and TaskService.
